dashboard.title: Salons overview
dashboard.hint: Manage each salon or jump to its owner console.

manage.title: Access info
manage.hint: View the owner console token, link and QR codes anytime. Keep secret — do not expose to guests.
manage.rotateConfirm: Regenerating the QR will break the existing QR/link. Continue?
manage.rotateOwnerConfirm: Regenerating the console token will break the existing console link. You'll need to re-share the new link with the salon. Continue?
manage.selectHint: Pick a salon to see its access info and full editing (menu, designers, ranks, QR, intakes).

gate.title: Enter admin key
gate.hint: An admin key is required to view salons, intakes & errors.
gate.label: Admin key

authError.title: Can't access
authError.hint: The admin key is invalid. Please check and try again.

qr.title: Salon QR
qr.hint: Place this QR at your entrance or tables. Guests scan it to start instantly.

onboarding.salonHint: Registering a salon issues an owner console token and a shared QR.
onboarding.slugHint: URL identifier — lowercase, digits and hyphens only
onboarding.designerHint: Pick a salon and add a designer to issue a staffToken and QR.
onboarding.shareHint: Hand the info below to the salon owner. Keep it secret from guests.
onboarding.designerShareHint: Hand the staffToken/QR below to the designer.

invalid.title: Can't access
invalid.hint: The console link is invalid or expired. Please contact your admin.

menu.hint: Add, edit and delete categories and services.
menu.emptyCategories: No categories yet. Please add a category.
menu.basePriceHint: Applied when there is no rank-based override
menu.rankPricesHint: A rank you enter overrides the base price when entering via that designer. Leave blank to skip.

ranks.title: Ranks
ranks.hint: Add, rename, or remove designer ranks. Used for per-rank pricing in the menu and for assigning designers.
ranks.empty: No ranks yet. Add a rank to use it for designer assignment and per-rank pricing.
ranks.deleteConfirm: Delete the "{name}" rank? Designers using it will be unassigned and matching per-rank prices in the menu will be removed (base price kept).
ranks.usageHint: Removing a rank in use automatically unassigns it from designers and the menu.

designers.hint: Add designers and assign ranks. Each gets a QR and inbox.
designers.name: Name

qr.hint: Place this QR at your entrance or mirror. Guests scan it to start instantly.

customers.title: Member treatment history
customers.subtitle: The karte built up from this guest's visits

invalid.title: History not found
invalid.hint: This guest has no treatment history, or belongs to another salon.
